runpod.note: Registers Runpod's official API MCP server for Pods, Serverless endpoints, templates, network volumes, and registries. The server requires RUNPOD_API_KEY in the Codex MCP environment; keep the key out of git and confirm account, resource, and cost boundaries before mutation.

runpod-docs.note: Registers Runpod's official unauthenticated documentation MCP server for Runpod feature, guide, and code-example lookup.
